title: PRD: Durable sync-queue delivery
body:
## Problem Statement

Sync jobs can be lost on transient failure.

## Solution

Add durable retry + dead-letter handling.

## User Stories

1. As an operator I can see jobs that exhausted retries.

title: Add retry backoff to the sync queue worker
body:
## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Failed sync jobs retry with exponential backoff capped at 30s
- [ ] A job that exhausts retries is moved to the dead-letter list
